scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check admin/admin.js && node --check build-apps-script.mjs && node --check build-pages.mjs && node --check functions/api/submit.js && node --check functions/api/admin/briefs.js && node --check functions/api/admin/sessions.js && node --check functions/api/session/create.js && node --check functions/api/session/[token].js && node --check functions/api/session/[token]/submit.js && node --check < google-apps-script/Code.gs
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run build && npm run build:pages
